/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/dog_wellbeing_node.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dog_wellbeing_node.dir/src/dog_wellbeing_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dog_wellbeing_node.dir/src/zmq_subscriber.cpp.o -o dog_wellbeing_node  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/libstorage_handoff.so.1.0.0 -lzmq -lpqxx -lpq -lpthread
